mapper.select: SELECT d.*, c.category_name as categoryName FROM device_info d LEFT JOIN device_category c ON d.category_id = c.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.create_time DESC
SELECT d.*, c.category_name as categoryName FROM device_info d LEFT JOIN device_category c ON d.category_id = c.id WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.deleted = 0

SELECT COALESCE(c.category_name, '未分类') as categoryName, COUNT(d.id) as cnt FROM device_info d LEFT JOIN device_category c ON d.category_id = c.id WHERE d.deleted = 0 GROUP BY d.category_id, c.category_name ORDER BY cnt DESC
